gameTitle: Pokémon Mystery Dungeon: Red Rescue Team

achievements.title: Thrust Into a New World...
achievements.description: Clear Tiny Woods and rescue Caterpie.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Getting the Hang of It
achievements.description: Clear Thunderwave Cave and separate the Magnemite.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: How Could You Even Feel Those Tremors?
achievements.description: Clear Mt. Steel and rescue Diglett.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Can't Let Them Get the Best of Us
achievements.description: Clear Sinister Woods and defeat Team Meanies.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: It's a Little TOO Quiet Here...
achievements.description: Clear Silent Chasm and prepare to face a great foe.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: A Legendary Challenge
achievements.description: Clear Mt. Thunder and defeat Zapdos to rescue Shiftry.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: It Can't Be True...
achievements.description: Clear Great Canyon and chat with Xatu.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: A Journey Across the World
achievements.description: Clear Lapis Cave.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Toasty!
achievements.description: Clear Mt. Blaze and defeat Moltres.

achievements.title: Keep Pushing On...
achievements.description: Clear Frosty Forest and defeat Articuno.

achievements.title: Now I'm Just Cold
achievements.description: Clear Mt. Freeze and discover the truth.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Things Are Heating Up Yet Again
achievements.description: Clear Magma Cavern and quell Groudon.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: The Greatest Heroes to Ever Live!
achievements.description: Clear Sky Tower, defeating Rayquaza and saving the world!
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: CHESTNUTS!
achievements.description: Clear Uproar Forest and defeat the Mankey Trio.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Oh Dear...
achievements.description: Clear Howling Forest and help Smeargle out.

achievements.title: Water-Dwelling Beast
achievements.description: Clear Stormy Sea and defeat Kyogre.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: The Guardian of the Trench
achievements.description: Clear Silver Trench and defeat Lugia.

achievements.title: Yes, It's Real!

achievements.title: Strongest Being
achievements.description: Clear Western Cave and defeat Mewtwo.

achievements.title: Stop! Thief!
achievements.description: Clear Northern Range and stop the burglar.

achievements.title: Do It for Her

achievements.title: Little Strokes Fell Great Oaks
achievements.description: Have a total of 1,000 Poké stored at the Felicity Bank.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Money Doesn't Grow on Trees
achievements.description: Have a total of 10,000 Poké stored at the Felicity Bank.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Rome Wasn't Built in a Day
achievements.description: Have a total of 100,000 Poké stored at the Felicity Bank.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Our First Promotion!
achievements.description: Obtain 50 or more rescue points to promote to the Bronze Rank.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Climbing the Ranks
achievements.description: Obtain 500 or more rescue points to promote to the Silver Rank.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Certified Gold (Rank)
achievements.description: Obtain 1,500 or more rescue points to promote to the Gold Rank.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: We Started from the Bottom
achievements.description: Obtain 3,000 or more rescue points to promote to the Platinum Rank.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Now We're Nearly at the Top
achievements.description: Obtain 7,500 or more rescue points to promote to the Diamond Rank.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Master of Aura
achievements.description: Obtain the Lucario Fig.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Master of Darkness
achievements.description: Obtain the Weavile Fig.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Master of Sturdiness
achievements.description: Obtain the Bonsly Fig.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Master of Fools
achievements.description: Obtain the Mime Jr. Fig.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Keeping on the Grind
achievements.description: Clear every course in the Makuhita Dojo.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: A Good Start
achievements.description: Level up to 10 with your original leader Pokémon.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Keep Up the Momentum
achievements.description: Level up to 25 with your original leader Pokémon.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Getting Even Stronger!
achievements.description: Level up to 50 with your original leader Pokémon.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: The Strongest There Ever Was!
achievements.description: Level up to 90 with your original leader Pokémon.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Budding Strength
achievements.description: Level up to 10 with your original partner Pokémon.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: We Can Do Anything Together!
achievements.description: Level up to 25 with your original partner Pokémon.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: My Trusty Friend...
achievements.description: Level up to 50 with your original partner Pokémon.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Natural Explorer
achievements.description: Explore 1,000 dungeon floors.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: A True Leader
achievements.description: Recruit 150 Pokémon to your team.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Darwinism for the Win
achievements.description: Evolve 20 Pokémon.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: We Know Quite a Few Tricks
achievements.description: Teach 50 unique moves between all of the permanent team members. The counter will update outside of dungeons.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: I Love This Place!
achievements.description: Let the mysterious force take you out of any dungeon.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: No Menu Where We're Going
achievements.description: Make it to floor 50 of Buried Relic without pressing B or letting the menu open itself.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Forever Satisfied...
achievements.description: Clear Southern Cavern without your Belly meter going under 92.
achievements.author: tuteur51

achievements.title: Trekking the Caves with a Weakling
achievements.description: Without switching the leader, clear Western Cave with a single partner Pokémon starting at level 5 or lower. There must not be any other Pokémon on the team.
achievements.author: tuteur51
